category_sources: source_facts.description says it allows GNU Readline to be used with arbitrary programs; official page describes improving terminal program interfaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is with-readline; official greenend.org.uk page title is with-readline.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official with-readline page and contains usage, source, mailing list, and developer links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official with-readline page lists https://github.com/ewxrjk/with-readline under Developers.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU Readline integration; official page describes adding line editing and history to terminal programs.
